text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... This is... the dawn of fortunate
prospects...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh... Trainer... But of course I am...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Time and time again, all of my predictions
brought me "great misfortune." It won't surprise
you to hear that my hands were shaking as I held
the crystal ball...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, in my morning divination session, the
result read "slightly modest fortune"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've been sacrificing my sleep these past few days
to win some good luck, and now fortune shines
upon me... And with such overwhelming
brightness...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's like a warm, fuzzy feeling inside of me... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is sleepy for the rest of the
day.
